An energetic and melodic rock song with a very fast tempo, featuring distorted guitars, electric bass, French horn, and drums, set in the key of Eb major with a chord progression of Eb, Cm, and Bb6, creating an epic and happy atmosphere throughout the 4/4 time signature composition.

An upbeat electronic instrumental pop song featuring electric guitar, acoustic bass, synth pad, drums, and choir aahs, set in a brisk 4/4 time signature at a Presto tempo of 170 BPM. The piece, in the key of C major, showcases a blend of melodic and corporate elements, with a touch of darkness amidst the energetic atmosphere. The chord progression of C, Cm, and F7 adds to the song's dynamic character.

A short fragment of rock and electronic music featuring a distorted guitar, set in the key of E minor with a moderate tempo and a 4/4 time signature. The mood is dark, energetic, and melodic, with a hint of epic and action. The chord progression includes F#7, G, A, C#7/E#, and Em7.

p22.caption: A short, slow-paced electronic ambient fragment featuring an ocarina, set in the key of C major with a single occurrence of the chords C and C7, creating a dark, meditative atmosphere suitable for film.

A melodic and relaxing electronic ambient song in 3/4 time signature, set in the key of E minor. The fretless bass, rock organ, synth pad, orchestral harp, and drums create a dreamy and meditative atmosphere. The tempo is at an Allegro pace of 133 beats per minute, with the chords B and G alternating throughout the piece.

A melodic electronic soundtrack featuring a string ensemble, flute, cello, fretless bass, and overdriven guitar, set in A minor with a 5/4 time signature and a moderate tempo of 120 bpm, evoking a relaxing yet dark cinematic atmosphere suitable for films or documentaries.

A short, energetic electronic and classical piece featuring a piano, set in F major with a 4/4 time signature. The composition maintains a very fast tempo, evoking a sense of darkness, melodic intrigue, and cinematic action.

A cheerful and melodic Christmas pop song featuring banjo, acoustic guitar, and bass. Set in C major with a lively 2/4 time signature, it moves at a brisk pace, evoking an inspiring and child-friendly atmosphere.

p23.caption: A melodic and happy pop-electronic song with a Christmas vibe, featuring drums, brass section, fretless bass, piano, and acoustic guitar. The track is in E minor, has a fast tempo of 140 BPM, and follows a 4/4 time signature. The main chord progression, Em7 and Bm7, repeats throughout the song, adding to its catchy and motivational feel.

A soundtrack composition with classical elements, this short song evokes a cinematic atmosphere, blending epic and dark tones with moments of relaxation and emotion. Performed by a piano, string ensemble, piccolo, music box, and French horn, it unfolds at a moderate tempo in 4/4 time, rooted in the key of G major. The harmonic structure revolves around the chords D and G, adding to its filmic character.

A captivating electronic song that transports the listener to a dreamy, melodic space. Synth brass leads the way, supported by synth pads and bass, while drums and fretless bass provide the rhythmic foundation. Set in F minor with a fast tempo, the piece features a chord sequence of C#, C, C#, and Eb6.

A meditative and relaxing electronic song with elements of easy listening, featuring a string ensemble, orchestral harp, acoustic guitar, clean electric guitar, and banjo. The piece is in A major, with a moderate tempo of 120 beats per minute and a 4/4 time signature. The main chord progression consists of A, E, F#m, and D.

This uplifting electronic song, set in C major with a 4/4 time signature, exudes a motivational and corporate vibe. The piano and clean electric guitar lead the melody, accompanied by the brass section, synth brass, and string ensemble. The piece maintains an Allegro tempo throughout, with the chord progression of Em7, C, and D repeating frequently, creating a sense of familiarity and inspiration.

p24.caption: A short, slow-paced electronic ambient fragment featuring an ocarina, set in the key of C major with a single occurrence of the chords C and C7, creating a dark, meditative atmosphere suitable for film.

A slow and relaxing classical piece featuring an acoustic guitar, this short song evokes a sense of happiness and inspiration. Written in the key of A minor with a 1/4 time signature, it's characterized by a chord sequence of E, Am, E7, Gm, and Gm7b5/F, adding emotional depth to its soothing melodies.

A lengthy classical composition in E minor, this piece exudes happiness and relaxation through its inspiring melodies. With a moderato tempo and a 3/4 time signature, it's performed solely on an acoustic guitar. The chord progression of A, Cdim, Em, F#7, and Em recurs throughout, lending a sense of familiarity and cohesion to the music.

A lengthy classical composition with electronic elements, this piece exudes a relaxing and meditative atmosphere. Driven by an acoustic guitar, ocarina, and piano, with electric bass and drums providing the rhythmic foundation, it unfolds in a unique 8/4 time signature. Set in the key of A minor and moving at an Allegro tempo, the melody weaves through a chord progression of Ab6, Am, and B.

A melodic electronic and soundtrack composition in G minor, featuring piano, choir, and strings, evoking a cinematic, epic, and romantic atmosphere. The piece unfolds at an Andante tempo in 3/4 time, with a chord progression of Cm, Dm, and Gm.

p25.caption: A melodic classical piece with a soundtrack vibe, featuring a blend of piano, electric piano, honky-tonk piano, music box, and clavinet, creating a relaxing yet slightly dark atmosphere. Set in the key of C major with a moderate tempo of 120 beats per minute, this song maintains a 4/4 time signature throughout its duration.

A short, energetic electronic song with a touch of pop influence, driven by a lively piano melody. Set in the key of G major with a fast tempo, it evokes a mix of emotions, from darkness to happiness. The piece maintains a steady 4/4 time signature throughout its brief duration.

This lengthy electronic ambient piece, set in B minor, unfolds at a moderate tempo with a 4/4 time signature. Synth strings and pads weave melodic lines that evoke a sense of spaciousness and dreaminess, while synth effects add an energetic edge. A fretless bass and percussive organ provide the rhythmic foundation, with the chord progression of Bm, F#m, and G recurring throughout the composition, contributing to its relaxing atmosphere.

In this electronic song, a vivacious tempo of 150 BPM propels the melody forward, with synth strings taking the lead, supported by the rhythmic foundation of drums, synth drums, and a synth bass, while an electric guitar adds its voice to the mix. The piece, written in A minor and adhering to a 4/4 time signature, journeys through a chord sequence of G, D, C, and Am, crafting an atmosphere that blends the energetic with the melodic, the dark with a touch of spacey ambiance.
A short fragment of energetic electronic music with a moderate tempo, featuring melodic elements that evoke a mix of happiness and darkness, potentially suitable for use in film.
